title: Gump - pes, který naucil lidi zít
original_title: Gump – pes, který naučil lidi žít
overview: A story told through the eyes of a stray dog called Gump . On a journey to find his way home to his owner, Gump encounters many challenges, meets new people, and makes a few canine friends along the way. A story about the devotion of a dog, who without hesitation will give his own life for the life of its beloved owner.
